summary: The CI job failed during compilation of pandas C++ SIMD extension code on macOS ARM64. A compile error in the NEON SIMD implementation caused metadata generation to fail, aborting the pip install step.
root_cause: A C++ compile error occurred in 'pandas/_libs/simd/moments_inst_neon.cpp' and 'pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp' when building with '-Werror' enabled on arm64-apple-darwin. The error halted metadata generation and caused the build to fail.

evidence.reason: Identifies the specific C++ header file and line where the compile error occurred.
Identifies the NEON SIMD implementation source file as a second site of compile error on ARM64.
Shows the compilation is targeting ARM64 (NEON) on macOS using clang++, confirming this is an architecture-specific build failure.
Confirms that warnings are treated as errors, meaning any warning in the SIMD code would be promoted to a hard compile error.
Shows --werror is explicitly passed as a setup argument, confirming compiler warnings cause build failure.
Confirms the compiler emitted an error that stopped compilation.

evidence.quote: × Encountered error while generating package metadata.
evidence.reason: Shows the downstream effect of the compile error: pip was unable to generate package metadata, aborting installation.
Final pip error confirming the build failed at the metadata generation stage due to the compile error.

suggested_fix: Investigate and fix the C++ compile error in 'pandas/_libs/simd/moments_inst_neon.cpp' (line 14) and 'pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp' (line 255) for ARM64/NEON compatibility. The full error message is truncated in the log; retrieve the complete clang++ output to identify the exact issue (likely an explicit constructor, narrowing conversion, or unsupported NEON intrinsic), then fix the offending code or add a targeted suppression if the warning is spurious under this compiler version.
